(born May 25, 1992) is a Colombian professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as a [winger](/wiki/Midfielder#Winger "Midfielder") for [Atlético Nacional](/wiki/Club_Atl%C3%A9tico_Nacional_S._A. "Club Atlético Nacional S. A.").

Colombian footballer (born 1992)

Dairon Asprilla

**Dairon Estibens Asprilla Rivas** (born May 25, 1992) is a Colombian professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as a [winger](/wiki/Midfielder#Winger "Midfielder") for [Atlético Nacional](/wiki/Club_Atl%C3%A9tico_Nacional_S._A. "Club Atlético Nacional S. A.").

## Professional career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Dairon_Asprilla&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Professional career")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [[icon]](/wiki/File:Wiki_letter_w_cropped.svg) | This section **needs expansion**. You can help by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Dairon_Asprilla&action=edit&section=). *(July 2024)* |

Asprilla debuted for [Alianza Petrolera](/wiki/Alianza_Petrolera "Alianza Petrolera") in his native Colombia when he was 20 years old. For 2015, he was the second top goalscorer of the club with 22 goals.[[2]](#cite_note-2) After several years playing in Colombia, Asprilla signed with [MLS](/wiki/MLS "MLS") club [Portland Timbers](/wiki/Portland_Timbers "Portland Timbers") on December 8, 2014.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

Asprilla played over 200 games for the Timbers, winning [MLS Cup 2015](/wiki/MLS_Cup_2015 "MLS Cup 2015") while at the club and scoring 33 goals to rank among the club's top MLS scorers.

Dairon shares the same last name with retired star striker [Faustino Asprilla](/wiki/Faustino_Asprilla "Faustino Asprilla"); however, the two are not father and son (although both are Colombian by nationality).[[4]](#cite_note-4)

## Honours

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Dairon_Asprilla&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Honours")]

**Portland Timbers**

* [MLS Cup](/wiki/MLS_Cup "MLS Cup"): 2015[[5]](#cite_note-5)
* [Western Conference](/wiki/Western_Conference_(MLS) "Western Conference (MLS)") (playoffs): 2015,[[6]](#cite_note-6) 2018, 2021
* [MLS is Back Tournament](/wiki/MLS_is_Back_Tournament "MLS is Back Tournament"): 2020

**Atlético Nacional**

* [Copa Colombia: 2024](/wiki/2024_Copa_Colombia "2024 Copa Colombia")
* [Categoría Primera A](/wiki/Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A "Categoría Primera A") : [2024 Finalización](/wiki/2024_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A_season#Torneo_Finalización "2024 Categoría Primera A season")
